description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, release, and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that uses the node:alpine image, runs "yarn" in before_script and then executes "yarn swagger project verify"; it should run only on branch pipelines for <GROUP>/<NAME> and be excluded from the master and production branches. In the release stage add a release job that uses the registry.gitlab.com/4geit/docker/semantic-release-gitlab image, runs "DEBUG=* semantic-release-gitlab", and runs only on the master branch of <GROUP>/<NAME>. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that uses the registry.gitlab.com/4geit/docker/docker-compose image, sets the environment name to staging with URL http://<NAME>.vc1s.4ge.it, runs "docker-compose down", "docker-compose build", and "docker-compose up -d", and runs only on tag pipelines for <GROUP>/<NAME>.
